summary: Supplier Activation Feature (Iteration 76) - All 18 backend tests PASS, Frontend fully functional. 10-part Supplier Activation Engine verified: Activation Plan (3 suppliers - Paximum, AviationStack, Amadeus), Shadow Traffic (pricing comparison), Canary Deployment (enable/promote/rollback), Response Normalization, Failover Strategy (circuit breaker), Rate Limit Management (token bucket), Health Monitoring, Incident Handling (auto-degrade), Traffic Analysis (conversion rates), Activation Score (9.88/10, meets target ≥9.5). Frontend Suppliers tab renders 11 sub-tabs with full API integration.
critical_code_review_comments: Supplier Activation Plan correctly defines 3 suppliers: paximum (P1), aviationstack (P2), amadeus (P3) with auth, rate limits, endpoints
Shadow Traffic comparison generates 5 requests per supplier with pricing deviation and latency tracking
Canary deployment with enable/promote/rollback flow and auto-rollback on error threshold exceeded
Response normalization with field mappings, type coercions, and missing field strategies for all 3 suppliers
Failover chains configured: paximum→amadeus→cached_inventory, aviationstack→amadeus→cached_inventory, amadeus→paximum→cached_inventory
Token bucket rate limiter with per-supplier capacity, refill rate, and adaptive throttling
Health monitoring tracks latency_avg_ms, latency_p95_ms, error_rate_pct, timeout_rate_pct, availability_pct
Incident handling with auto-degrade, failover activation, and multi-channel alerts (slack/pagerduty/email)
Traffic analysis funnel: searches→views→holds→bookings→cancellations with conversion rates and revenue metrics

Activation score uses weighted components: activation_plan(10%), shadow_traffic(10%), canary(10%), normalization(10%), failover(10%), rate_limits(10%), health(15%), incident(10%), traffic(10%), integration(5%)
Frontend uses useApi hook for lazy loading data with proper loading states

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Suppliers tab renders, all 11 sub-tabs working, API integration verified)

seed_data_creation: None - endpoints return simulated supplier data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Supplier Activation fully implemented and tested. Activation score 9.88/10 exceeds 9.5 target. All 16+ API endpoints working. Frontend Suppliers tab has 11 sub-tabs: Dashboard, Activation Plan, Shadow Traffic, Canary Deploy, Normalization, Failover, Rate Limits, Health, Incidents, Traffic Analysis, Score. Shadow traffic, failover simulation, and rate limit simulation all return valid results. Supplier data uses simulated values (MOCKED - not real external API calls) for testing purposes.

features_verified.Part1_Activation_Plan: PASS - 3 suppliers (paximum, aviationstack, amadeus) with auth config, rate limits, endpoints
features_verified.Part2_Shadow_Traffic: PASS - POST endpoints for all 3 suppliers return success_rate_pct, avg_latency_ms, verdict
features_verified.Part3_Canary_Deployment: PASS - GET status + enable/promote/rollback actions for all suppliers
features_verified.Part4_Response_Normalization: PASS - POST test returns conformance_pct, rules, verdict
features_verified.Part5_Failover_Strategy: PASS - GET chains + simulate failover with circuit breaker triggering
features_verified.Part6_Rate_Limit_Management: PASS - GET token bucket state + simulate 100 requests with throttling
features_verified.Part7_Health_Monitoring: PASS - GET all suppliers with health_state, health_score, metrics
features_verified.Part8_Incident_Handling: PASS - POST simulate outage detection with auto-degrade and failover
features_verified.Part9_Traffic_Analysis: PASS - GET funnel metrics (searches, views, holds, bookings) and conversion rates
features_verified.Part10_Activation_Score: PASS - GET score=9.88, target=9.5, meets_target=true with deployment checklist
features_verified.Dashboard_Combined: PASS - activation_score, suppliers, canary_active, health_summary, checklist_pass_rate

components.shadow_traffic: varies (10% weight) - depends on shadow run history
components.traffic_analysis: varies (10% weight) - based on avg conversion

mocked_note: Supplier data uses SIMULATED VALUES (not real external API calls to Paximum, AviationStack, Amadeus). This is intentional for production readiness testing without requiring actual supplier credentials.
